TutoExplainContent: Welcome to Color Lab! This activity lets you mix colors, test your color matching skills, and explore color harmonies.
TutoNetworkContent: Click here to share this activity and collaborate with other users.
TutoModeContent: Switch between Free Paint, Challenge Mode, and Color Harmony Mode.
TutoBowlContent: See your currently mixed color here.
TutoSlidersContent: Adjust the Red, Green, and Blue sliders to change the mix.
TutoDifficultyContent: Change the difficulty of the challenge here.
TutoChallengeBowlContent: Match the left bowl color to the target bowl.
TutoHintContent: Click the robot to automatically solve the most incorrect color channel.
TutoHarmonyContent: Click here to cycle through different geometric harmony patterns.
TutoWheelContent: Drag the points to pick harmony colors.
TutoLightnessContent: Drag the inner ring to adjust lightness.
TutoSwatchesContent: The resulting colors form a generated palette.
TutoResetContent: Click here to reset the current activity.
